creator: viktor.dvz@gmail.com
text:
Hi.
Can't build grafana 9

go: error loading go 1.16 module graph: github.com/containerd/containerd@v1.6.6 requires

===> Vendoring github.com/grafana/grafana dependencies
===>  Patching for grafana9-9.1.7

===>   grafana9-9.1.7 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/go119 - found
===>  Configuring for grafana9-9.1.7
===>  Building for grafana9-9.1.7

freebsd-version -kru
13.1-RELEASE-p1

13.1-RELEASE-p1
